headline: Own today—don't let the weekend wreck you
summary: Today you must lock in discipline before Friday by sticking to Huel portions and moving your body intentionally.
details: Eat only pre-portioned Huel today—no emotional snacking, period. Row for 45 minutes or run for 60 minutes; you need real deficit creation. You're losing 0.14 kg/week when you need 0.59, and Thursday always determines whether your weekend succeeds or fails.
